prompt_summary: Translate each Lean declaration from the Lean statement alone, with no paper context.
Preserve every visible variable, binder, hypothesis, domain condition, equivalence or implication direction, and conclusion.
Do not replace formulas with theorem labels, informal endpoints, or proof-route summaries.

definition_log_mgf_formula.statement: \forall {Seller : Type u_1} {Rating : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Rating] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Rating] (M : FiniteRatingLDPModel Seller Rating) (θ : Seller) (z : ℝ), paperLogMGF M θ z = log (\sum y, ((typeLaw θ) y).toReal * exp (z * score y))

definition_rate_function_formula.statement: \forall {Seller : Type u_1} {Rating : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Rating] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Rating] (M : FiniteRatingLDPModel Seller Rating) (θ : Seller) (a : ℝ), paperRateFunction M θ a = sSup (range fun z  =>  z * a - paperLogMGF M θ z)

lemmaC_pk_complement_source_threshold_ra.statement: \forall {Seller : Type u_1} {Rating : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Rating] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Rating] (M : FiniteRatingLDPModel Seller Rating) (sampleRate : Seller \to ℝ) (hi lo : Seller) (gHi gLo : ℕ), 0 < gHi \to 0 < gLo \to sampleRate hi = ↑gHi \to sampleRate lo = ↑gLo \to (\forall (a : ℝ), BddAbove (range fun z  =>  finiteLegendreValue (typeLaw hi) score a z)) \to (\forall (a : ℝ), BddAbove (range fun z  =>  finiteLegendreValue (typeLaw lo) score a z)) \to \forall (a z : ℝ), HasDerivAt (fun t  =>  logMGF hi t) a (z * (↑gHi)⁻¹) \to HasDerivAt (fun t  =>  logMGF lo t) a (-(z * (↑gLo)⁻¹)) \to 0 \le pmfExp (twoSampleRateBlockLaw M hi lo gHi gLo) (twoSampleRateBlockScore M gHi gLo) \to \forall {samplePos sampleNeg : (Fin gHi \to Rating) × (Fin gLo \to Rating)}, 0 < ((twoSampleRateBlockLaw M hi lo gHi gLo) samplePos).toReal \to 0 < twoSampleRateBlockScore M gHi gLo samplePos \to 0 < ((twoSampleRateBlockLaw M hi lo gHi gLo) sampleNeg).toReal \to twoSampleRateBlockScore M gHi gLo sampleNeg < 0 \to ExponentialRateCertificate (fun n  =>  twoSamplePkComplementErrorProb M hi lo (n * gHi) (n * gLo) (↑gHi)⁻¹ (↑gLo)⁻¹) (pairwiseSellerThresholdRate M sampleRate hi lo)

lemmaC_floor_score_gap_rate_from_logMGF_.statement: \forall {Seller : Type u_1} {Rating : Type u_2} [inst : Fintype Rating] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Rating] (M : FiniteRatingLDPModel Seller Rating) (sampleRate : Seller \to ℝ) (hi lo : Seller), 0 < sampleRate hi \to 0 < sampleRate lo \to \forall (a z : ℝ), z \le 0 \to HasDerivAt (fun t  =>  logMGF hi t) a (z * (sampleRate hi)⁻¹) \to HasDerivAt (fun t  =>  logMGF lo t) a (-(z * (sampleRate lo)⁻¹)) \to (\forall (b : ℝ), pairwiseRateObjective sampleRate hi lo a \le pairwiseRateObjective sampleRate hi lo b) \to ratingLawStraddlesThreshold M hi a \to ratingLawStraddlesThreshold M lo a \to ExponentialRateCertificate (twoSampleFloorScoreGapLeftTailProb M sampleRate hi lo) (pairwiseSellerThresholdRate M sampleRate hi lo)

theorem1_finite_chain_uniform_floor_obje.statement: \forall {n : ℕ} {Rating : Type u_1} [inst : Fintype Rating] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Rating] [DecidableEq (finiteChainOrderedPair n)] [inst_3 : Nonempty (finiteChainAdjacentIndex n)] (M : FiniteRatingLDPModel (Fin n) Rating) (sampleRate : Fin n \to ℝ), (\forall (θ : Fin n), 0 < sampleRate θ) \to \forall (a z : finiteChainOrderedPair n \to ℝ), (\forall (p : finiteChainOrderedPair n), z p \le 0) \to (\forall (p : finiteChainOrderedPair n), HasDerivAt (fun t  =>  logMGF (finiteChainOrderedPairHi p) t) (a p) (z p * (sampleRate (finiteChainOrderedPairHi p))⁻¹)) \to (\forall (p : finiteChainOrderedPair n), HasDerivAt (fun t  =>  logMGF (finiteChainOrderedPairLo p) t) (a p) (-(z p * (sampleRate (finiteChainOrderedPairLo p))⁻¹))) \to (\forall (p : finiteChainOrderedPair n) (b : ℝ), pairwiseRateObjective sampleRate (finiteChainOrderedPairHi p) (finiteChainOrderedPairLo p) (a p) \le pairwiseRateObjective sampleRate (finiteChainOrderedPairHi p) (finiteChainOrderedPairLo p) b) \to (\forall (p : finiteChainOrderedPair n), ratingLawStraddlesThreshold M (finiteChainOrderedPairHi p) (a p)) \to (\forall (p : finiteChainOrderedPair n), ratingLawStraddlesThreshold M (finiteChainOrderedPairLo p) (a p)) \to HasExponentialRate (fun k  =>  1 - finiteUniformFloorPkObjective M sampleRate finiteChainOrderedPairHi finiteChainOrderedPairLo k) (minFiniteChainAdjacentThresholdRate M sampleRate)

theorem1_finite_chain_adjacent_threshold.statement: \forall {n : ℕ} {Rating : Type u_1} [inst : Fintype Rating] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Rating] [inst_2 : Nonempty (finiteChainAdjacentIndex n)] (M : FiniteRatingLDPModel (Fin n) Rating) (sampleRate : Fin n \to ℝ), (\forall (θ : Fin n), 0 < sampleRate θ) \to \forall (a z : finiteChainOrderedPair n \to ℝ), (\forall (p : finiteChainOrderedPair n), HasDerivAt (fun t  =>  logMGF (finiteChainOrderedPairHi p) t) (a p) (z p * (sampleRate (finiteChainOrderedPairHi p))⁻¹)) \to (\forall (p : finiteChainOrderedPair n), HasDerivAt (fun t  =>  logMGF (finiteChainOrderedPairLo p) t) (a p) (-(z p * (sampleRate (finiteChainOrderedPairLo p))⁻¹))) \to minFiniteChainAdjacentThresholdRateTop M sampleRate = ↑(minFiniteChainAdjacentObjectiveRate M sampleRate a)

theorem1_finite_chain_uniform_floor_obje.statement: \forall {n m : ℕ} [DecidableEq (finiteChainOrderedPair n)] [inst : Nonempty (finiteChainAdjacentIndex n)] (M : FiniteRatingLDPModel (Fin n) (Fin (m + 1))) (sampleRate : Fin n \to ℝ), (\forall (θ : Fin n), 0 < sampleRate θ) \to (\forall (p : finiteChainOrderedPair n) (t : Fin (m + 1)), (pmfProb (typeLaw (finiteChainOrderedPairLo p)) fun r  =>  t \le r) \le pmfProb (typeLaw (finiteChainOrderedPairHi p)) fun r  =>  t \le r) \to Monotone score \to fullSupport \to score 0 < score (last m) \to HasExtendedExponentialRate (fun k  =>  1 - finiteUniformFloorPkObjective M sampleRate finiteChainOrderedPairHi finiteChainOrderedPairLo k) (minFiniteChainAdjacentThresholdRateTop M sampleRate)

\forall {n : ℕ} {Rating : Type u_1} [inst : Fintype Rating] [inst_1 : DecidableEq Rating] [DecidableEq (finiteChainOrderedPair n)] [inst_3 : Nonempty (finiteChainAdjacentIndex n)] (M : FiniteRatingLDPModel (Fin n) Rating) (sampleRate : Fin n \to ℝ), (\forall (θ : Fin n), 0 < sampleRate θ) \to \forall (a z : finiteChainOrderedPair n \to ℝ), (\forall (p : finiteChainOrderedPair n), z p \le 0) \to (\forall (p : finiteChainOrderedPair n), HasDerivAt (fun t  =>  logMGF (finiteChainOrderedPairHi p) t) (a p) (z p * (sampleRate (finiteChainOrderedPairHi p))⁻¹)) \to (\forall (p : finiteChainOrderedPair n), HasDerivAt (fun t  =>  logMGF (finiteChainOrderedPairLo p) t) (a p) (-(z p * (sampleRate (finiteChainOrderedPairLo p))⁻¹))) \to \forall (rLow rHigh : Rating), (\forall (θ : Fin n), 0 < ((typeLaw θ) rLow).toReal) \to (\forall (θ : Fin n), 0 < ((typeLaw θ) rHigh).toReal) \to (\forall (r : Rating), score rLow \le score r) \to (\forall (r : Rating), score r \le score rHigh) \to score rLow < score rHigh \to minFiniteChainAdjacentThresholdRateTop M sampleRate = ↑(minFiniteChainAdjacentThresholdRate M sampleRate) \to HasExponentialRate (fun k  =>  1 - finiteUniformFloorPkObjective M sampleRate finiteChainOrderedPairHi finiteChainOrderedPairLo k) (minFiniteChainAdjacentThresholdRate M sampleRate)

assumption_pairwise_threshold_minimizer.statement: {Seller : Type u_1} \to {Rating : Type u_2} \to [inst : Fintype Rating] \to [inst_1 : DecidableEq Rating] \to FiniteRatingLDPModel Seller Rating \to (Seller \to ℝ) \to Seller \to Seller \to ℝ \to Prop

assumption_two_sided_score_witnesses.statement: {Seller : Type u_1} \to {Rating : Type u_2} \to [inst : Fintype Rating] \to [inst_1 : DecidableEq Rating] \to FiniteRatingLDPModel Seller Rating \to ℕ \to ℕ \to Prop

assumption_full_finite_ordinal_rating_su.statement: {Seller : Type u_1} \to {Rating : Type u_2} \to [inst : Fintype Rating] \to [inst_1 : DecidableEq Rating] \to FiniteRatingLDPModel Seller Rating \to Prop

assumption_score_range_and_strict_span.statement: {Rating : Type u_1} \to (Rating \to ℝ) \to Rating \to Rating \to Prop
